---
title: "Documentation: Test and document API with Insomnia"
labels: documentation, testing, insomnia, required
---

**Testing documentation — Required.**

As a developer, I want to test and document my API endpoints in Insomnia so that I can prove my backend works correctly.

### Tasks
- [ ] Create Insomnia requests for main endpoints: `POST /login`, `GET /products`, `GET /categories`, `POST /categories` (admin).
- [ ] Add JWT token to protected requests in Authorization header.
- [ ] Test shopping cart endpoints if completed: `GET /cart`.
- [ ] Test profile endpoints if completed: `GET /profile`.
- [ ] Save successful response screenshots.
- [ ] Use screenshots in README or final presentation.

### Done when
- Login endpoint is tested
- Products endpoints are tested
- Categories endpoints are tested
- Shopping cart endpoints are tested (if completed)
- Profile endpoints are tested (if completed)
- Screenshots are saved for README or presentation
